popularStory.headline: Origem do Sobrenome Drummond
popularStory.description: Conhecido como Clã Drummond, este é um clã muito respeitado que surgiu na Escócia e lá tem uma influência muito grande. O Clã Drummond é um clã escocês originário da região das Terras Altas, do dist …

zh.lifeSummary: 當John Drummond於1362年出生在蘇格蘭培爾卡吉爾時，他的父親John Drummond44歲，母親Mary Margaret Montefichet32歲。他和Elizabeth Sinclair至少有4個兒子和6個女兒。他去世於1402年11月8日在英國蘇格蘭享年40歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭培爾卡吉爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Drummond于1362年出生在苏格兰培爾卡吉爾时，他的父亲John Drummond44岁，母亲Mary Margaret Montefichet32岁。他和Elizabeth Sinclair至少有4个儿子和6个女儿。他去世于1402年11月8日在英国苏格兰享年40岁，埋葬在苏格兰培爾卡吉爾。

nameMeanings.name: Drummond
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from any of various places, notably the barony of Drummond, which is probably identical with the parish of Drymen (Stirlingshire), named from Gaelic drumainn, a derivative of druim ‘ridge’. It has been said that the principal family of this name are descended from a Hungarian nobleman, Maurice, who accompanied Edgar Atheling and his sister Margaret to Scotland in 1068, where she married King Malcolm III. However, there is disagreement on whether or not this was the case.

English: occasionally perhaps from an unrecorded Middle English personal name Dromund (Old Norse Drómundr, apparently from a word denoting a kind of Byzantine galley prevalent till the 12th cent., from Greek dromōn ‘runner’).

variants.name: Drummonds
meanings: Scottish: variant of Drummond , with post-medieval excrescent -s. In Britain this surname is found mainly in County Durham.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When John Drummond was born in 1362, in Cargill, Perthshire, Scotland, his father, John Drummond, was 44 and his mother, Mary Margaret Montefichet, was 32. He had at least 4 sons and 6 daughters with Elizabeth Sinclair. He died on 8 November 1402, in Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 40, and was buried in Cargill, Perthshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Drummond est né en 1362, à Cargill, Perthshire, Écosse, son père, John Drummond, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Mary Margaret Montefichet, avait 32 ans. Il a eu au moins 4 fils et 6 filles avec Elizabeth Sinclair. Il est décédé le 8 novembre 1402, à Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 40 ans, et a été enterré à Cargill, Perthshire, Écosse.

Er hatte mit Elizabeth Sinclair mindestens 4 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er starb am 8. November 1402 im Alter von 40 Jahren in Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Cargill, Perthshire, Scotland begraben.

Lui avuto almeno 4 figli e 6 figlie con Elizabeth Sinclair. Morì il 8 novembre 1402, nel Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 40 anni, e fu sepolto a Cargill, Perthshire, Scotland.

ko.Stobhall, Perth, Scotland: 영국 스코틀랜드 퍼스 앤드 킨로스 퍼스
ko.lifeSummary: John Drummond(이)가 1362년 스컷랜드 퍼스실르 카르길에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Drummond(은)는 44세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary Margaret Montefichet(은)는 32세였다. 그는 Elizabeth Sinclair(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1402년 11월 8일 영국 스코틀랜드에서 40세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 퍼스실르 카르길에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Drummond родился в 1362 г. в местности каргилл, пиртшир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени John Drummond было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Mary Margaret Montefichet, 32. У него было по крайней мере 4 сына и 6 дочерей от Elizabeth Sinclair. Он умер 8 ноября 1402 г. в местности Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 40 лет и был похоронен в местности каргилл, пиртшир, Шотландия.
